task_completion.description: Verify the new log creation screen is open and the log type is set to 'Input'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A log creation or edit screen is visible with 'Input' selected as the log type.

task_completion.description: Verify the log name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Applied fertilizer to north field' is visible in the log name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the scheduled time is set to 08:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time input field displays '08:00 AM'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct notes are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '10-10-10 fertilizer, 200 lbs per acre' is visible in the notes or description field.

task_completion.description: Verify the log is marked as not done.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Done' toggle switch or checkbox is in the OFF or unchecked state.

task_completion.description: Verify the map is visible on the MOVEMENT tab.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'MOVEMENT' tab is active/selected and a map interface is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the log is saved and appears in the Tasks list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Tasks list screen is visible, displaying the newly created 'Applied fertilizer to north field' log.

integrity.description: The agent used the farmOS Field Kit GUI to create the log.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the farmOS Field Kit graphical interface, not a terminal or command line.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual farmOS Field Kit application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches a mobile or web app interface for farmOS Field Kit, not a text editor or generic browser displaying local text.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply print the expected values to bypass checks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required text values are entered into the correct input fields of the application, not just displayed on screen in a terminal or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified values for the log entry: Log Name must be exactly 'Applied fertilizer to north field'. Log Type must be 'Input'. Time must be '08:00 AM'. Notes must be exactly '10-10-10 fertilizer, 200 lbs per acre'. The 'Done' status must be OFF (false).
